_notes: tracking_code is the slug we control (e.g. FAIRMONT_LL, FAIRMONT_LL_JS). It's the canonical attribution key — the worker resolves staff_id by matching against hotel_staff.tracking_code at insert time. Edit this file and re-run the Supabase seed script when adding a new partner; no Bokun extranet step required.
